mentions.raw_name: The comet (shierak qiya / the Bleeding Star)
Iron bracelet with uncut fire opal
Ring of skulls on rusted iron spears
Daenerys Targaryen (the Unburnt, Mother of Dragons, Khaleesi)
Aerys II Targaryen (referenced as Dany's father, dead)
Jorah's first wife (a Glover of Deepwood Motte, referenced, unnamed, dead)
Balerion the Black Dread (referenced, historical dragon)
Old Valyria (referenced as source of dragon names)
Kingsguard (referenced — White Bull commanded it, Boros Blount a member)
Night's Watch (referenced — Jorah's father took the black)
The Thirteen (Xaro Xhoan Daxos's merchant guild in Qarth)
Dothraki beliefs (night lands afterlife, gods, shierak qiya omen, braids and defeat, ghosts)
Old Valyrian gods (Aegon's dragons named for them)
The Maid (of the Seven — Jorah compares Lynesse to "the Maid herself made flesh")
Braavosi (Jorah fought them on the Rhoyne)
Valyrian (language of Free Cities spoken by Xaro)
The comet (shierak qiya / the Bleeding Star)
Iron bracelet with uncut fire opal
Scrolls (found in ruined city, dry and crumbling)
Old bronze coins (found in Vaes Tolorro)
Purple glass bits (found in Vaes Tolorro)
Stone flagons with snake-shaped handles (found in Vaes Tolorro)
Ring of skulls on rusted iron spears
Champion's laurel (given by Robert to Jorah)
Humped creatures (camels, ridden by the three strangers)
Empty marble plinth (Vaes Tolorro, statue taken)
The comet (shierak qiya) — interpreted as omen by Dothraki and as divine herald by Dany
Dragon fire-breathing — dragons hiss, spit, steam rises from nostrils
Dragon heat — palpable warmth, bodies steam on cold nights
Mirri Maz Duur's curse — Dany recalls the maegi swore she would never bear a living child
Dany's dream — dreams of riding dragons instead of horses with Drogo
Greyjoy Rebellion (Balon Greyjoy's rebellion against Robert; final battle at Pyke)
Robert's Rebellion (implied — Aerys' Kingsguard, Robert as "the Usurper")
Lord Commander of the Kingsguard (the White Bull)
Queen of love and beauty (tourney title Jorah gave Lynesse)
Mother of Dragons (title given to Dany)
Devilgrass (tough brown grass growing in red waste and between paving stones)
Red scorpion (stings one woman at Vaes Tolorro)
Hrakkar (white lion of the Dothraki sea)
